_meta.title: v3.0 Agent destination — 6 remaining ALM items enumeration
_meta.methodology: v3.0 Agent destination is criterion-union of (a) extreme.json phases touching ALM scope after LAUNCH/PREP/ALM-CONSCIOUS — i.e. ALM-TRAIN open sub-tasks + ALM-RC E-track — plus (b) alm_consciousness_standalone.json#destinations[1].blocking_options = [A2, D8]. Intersect with status != done + state != done. Output exactly 6 items as per remaining.alm_days=6.

Alternative: prep pod B recipe on CPU while A1 runs, auto-fire at A1 step_500 ckpt upload. Alternative cost: $36 (12h × $2.99/h) single pod serial after A1 completes.

requires_explicit_action_details.cheapest_path: prep-only (no GPU launch). Create A2 Orch-OR LoRA config + tool-use consolidation recipe on CPU. Auto-trigger pod B at A1 step_500 R2 event. NO h100 budget increase needed (pod B reuses lnzliav2e8du6i after A1 completes). Serial execution saves $36.
requires_explicit_action_details.note: Serial reuse of A1 pod — A1 wall 12h + A2 wall 12h = 24h total. If parallel pod B needed, $36 extra (violates h100_authorized=2 cap per alm_a2_readiness L139-150 verdict AT CAP).

requires_explicit_action_details.cheapest_path: Declare r9-lenient-pass (0.933 avg_score, 0.867 completion, phi_holo=6111) as v3.0 Agent production candidate. Update production_model_status.json candidate field from null → r9 LoRA. Unblocks the 'cannot evaluate' status without new evaluation work.
requires_explicit_action_details.note: Alternative: 2h CPU offline eval on step_4000-10000 to fill missing metrics. Current 'BLOCKED' status is a measurement gap, not a training gap.

auto_close_after_a1_a2_rationale: A2 closes by definition when A2 completes. D8/E-voice/E-avatar/E-hire close via extreme_sync.hexa promotion from existing evidence files once the harness re-runs (all 4 have state artifacts that already exist as of 2026-04-16). E-deploy is the lone item NOT auto-closing — it requires a human-initiated promotion decision on production_model_status.json#candidate.
total_residual_cost_rationale: 5 of 6 items close at $0 (4 stale flags + A2 serial reuse of A1 pod). E-deploy closes at $0 via promotion-declaration (the r9 adapter gate is PASSED; promotion is a state-file update). If A2 parallel pod B chosen: +$36.
eta_after_a1_a2: Day 5 end (2026-04-21T00:00Z) — extreme.json#destinations[1].projected.alm_date=2026-04-22 (L800). Minus 1 day if extreme_sync.hexa runs immediately (4 stale flags flip today).
next_single_action: Run `hexa $NEXUS/shared/harness/extreme_sync.hexa sync` to auto-promote the 4 stale flags (D8, E-voice, E-avatar, E-hire) from existing shared/state evidence files. This is a read-only harness execution producing JSON state update — ZERO training cost, ZERO roadmap manual edit, and immediately drops v3.0 Agent remaining from 6 → 2 (A2 + E-deploy only). After sync, the sibling A1 pod will naturally close A2 over the next 12h, leaving E-deploy as the sole human-initiated gate.
brutal_honesty_flags: Stored remaining.alm_days=6 (L786) is inflated. True remaining is 2 (A2 training + E-deploy promotion decision). 4 items are harness-sync artifacts.

D8 is a cross-roadmap phantom id — it appears in alm_consciousness_standalone.json#destinations[1].blocking_options (L625-628) but is NOT in tracks.D.options (L242-289, D1-D7 only). The artifact lives in CLM roadmap + d8_self_critique_baked_20260416.json. This cross-ref should be resolved.

tool_use_gate_20260416.json confirms r9 PASS but production_model_status.json still points at r4 step_2000 as current. There is an unacknowledged promotion candidate — r9 LoRA adapter running on itfl66q4z768kh endpoint is the DE FACTO v3.0 Agent production model, not r4 step_2000.

extreme_sync.hexa has NOT been observed to auto-promote from sub-state evidence files (only from sub-roadmap state fields). The sync logic (L329-354) reads hs_evidence but does not scan shared/state/*.json for criterion-matching artifacts. This is an architectural gap — sync harness needs a 'scan evidence files' pass to close stale flags without manual intervention.
